# Dave & Son Plumbing & Heating

> Plumber serving Schenectady, NY and surrounding areas. Dave & Son Plumbing & Heating has been providing quality plumber services to Schenectady and surrounding areas. 21+ satisfied customers.

## Key Facts
- Business: Dave & Son Plumbing & Heating
- Category: Plumber
- Location: Serving Schenectady and Surrounding Areas, Schenectady, NY
- Phone: (518) 858-9093
- Email: contact@dave-and-son-plumbing-and-heating.com
- Rating: 4.7/5 from 21 reviews
- Years in business: 10
- Jobs completed: 500

## Services
- [Drain Cleaning](undefined/services/drain-cleaning/): Professional plumber drain cleaning service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.
- [Pipe Repair](undefined/services/pipe-repair/): Professional plumber pipe repair service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.
- [Water Heater Installation](undefined/services/water-heater-installation/): Professional plumber water heater installation service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.
- [Sewer Line Repair](undefined/services/sewer-line-repair/): Professional plumber sewer line repair service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.
- [Fixture Installation](undefined/services/fixture-installation/): Professional plumber fixture installation service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.
- [Emergency Plumbing](undefined/services/emergency-plumbing/): Professional plumber emergency plumbing service. Quality workmanship, fair pricing, fully guaranteed.

## Frequently Asked Questions
- **Do you offer free estimates for plumber services?** Yes, we provide free, no-obligation estimates for all plumber services. Call us today to schedule yours.
- **Are you licensed and insured?** Absolutely. We are fully licensed, bonded, and insured for your complete protection.
- **How quickly can you respond to plumber emergencies?** We offer same-day service for most jobs and 24/7 emergency response for urgent situations.
- **What areas do you serve?** We serve Schenectady, NY and all surrounding communities within a 25-mile radius.
- **Do you guarantee your work?** 100% satisfaction guarantee on every job. If you're not happy, we'll make it right.
